Car Size Comparison

Audi A4 B8 Sedan (2010) · Tesla Model 3 (Highland) · Tesla Model Y (Juniper) · Zeekr 7GT — real side-view photos scaled to true dimensions, carsized-style.

Side view — length & height

Front view — width

Specifications

Δ column is Car B minus Car A. Photos and silhouettes are scaled to real dimensions; photos have slight perspective, so treat them as close approximations. The Model Y photo is the pre-facelift car (the Juniper profile is nearly identical); the Zeekr photo is the Chinese-market 007 GT, sold in Europe as the 7GT. Sources: auto-data.net (A4 B8), automobiledimension (Model 3), EV Database (Model Y Juniper), evspecifications (Zeekr 7GT). Photos via Wikimedia Commons: A4 (Overlaet, CC BY-SA 3.0), Model 3 (Kazyakuruma, CC0), Model Y (Bretwa, CC BY-SA 4.0), Zeekr (JustAnotherCarDesigner, CC0); backgrounds removed, cropped and scaled.
